panettone-in-mycook-pequerecetas.name: Panettone In Mycook

ingredients.item: 100 g of force flour (you can buy them here)
400 g of force flour (you can buy them here)
100 g of conned fruit (you can buy them here)
1 teaspoon of azahar water (you can buy them here)
Rilling of an organic lemon's skin
Rilling of an organic orange's skin
Mold for panettone with 500 g or 1 kg (you can buy them here)

instructions: We dissolve the yeast in the warm water. We add to Mycook's pitcher flour, the leaven dissolved in water, sugar and egg yolks and mix for 30 seconds at speed 4. Let's get into another bowl, and cover with film paper or a cloth we let them up in a hot place till they double their volume, which can take about two hours. Meanwhile we can remove raisins into some rum or apple juice. That way they will be soft and flavoured. We can also use them to prepare a mixture with honey, lemon and orange frilling, vanilla extract and azahar water in a small bowl. We put them all together and put them apart for later use at the time of baking.

In the Myscook pitcher we add the rest of the force flour, the rest of the sugar and the pint of salt and program 30 seconds at speed 3. We added the preference, egg yolks, temperate milk and the mixture we had reserved with honey and citrus. We schedule a minute at Speed 4.

We cut the butter, that's got to be at room temperature, in crapes. We schedule 10 minutes in amassed mode. While the Mycook goes amassed, we put the butter dice to the pitcher through the hole. When about a minute remains we add raisins and confided fruit to be incorporated and well mixed into the mass. We cover with a cloth and let up about another two hours at a hot and dry place

After lifting time, we put it out of Mycook's pitcher and carefully tighten the dough to tear it up. We form a ball and place into the panettone mold. That mass gives for a 1 kg or 2 500 g panettone, if we wanted to make 2 we divide the mass into two, we form two balls and we place them into two mold Let them rise again into the mold till the mass arrives or slightly exceed the mold's edge. Proximately compute between 2 and 4 hours for this process depending on temperature and moisture.

We purify the oven at 180 ° (heat up and down). We paint the surface of the panettone with an egg and with a sharp knife we make a cross cut. At this moment we can also add pernated sugar or some ground almonds or fruit triples. We put a piece of butter in the middle of the cut. We baked for about 40- 45 minutes at 180 °. If we see that after about 30 minutes the surface's getting too dark, we cover it with aluminum paper to stop them from burning.

When we get him out of the oven, with two long knits or needles we get through his bottom. We turn his panettone and put his face down and put his needles and his knapshots back onto a pair of high objects from where he can hang up. Two high pots, two chairs or milk boards. We let him cool this way for several hours, so we get him to hold his shape. Once cold, if we like we can sprinkle with glass sugar.

panna-cotta-with-yogurt-argiro.name: Panna Cotta With Yogurt

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon vanilla extract or 1 vanilla stick
Sweet orange spoon for serving (or other spoon sweet)
1 tablespoon vanilla extract or 1 vanilla stick
Sweet orange spoon for serving (or other spoon sweet)

instructions: Place the gelatin in a bowl first and cover with cold water.
Allow for 5 to 10 minutes to soak well and swell.
In a bowl, add the yogurt and half the milk cream.
We whisk them to homogenize.
Add to pot the remaining cream, sugar, vanilla (after tearing it in half and removing its fruit) and zest and mix to melt the sugar well and heat the mixture, but without boiling.
We pull it out of the fire.
Drain the gelatines well and add them to the warm mixture.
Mix very well to melt.
Allow the mixture for 10 minutes to become lukewarm and add to the cold mixture of yoghurt and cream a little bit and always stirring with wire, to homogenize.
Place in a large Jell-O form or 8 individual moulds and leave it in the refrigerator to cool well and stabilise for about 3 hours.
After it cools off, we dissipate it (deeping the panacotta panacotta in hot water) and garnish the sweet.

papaya-puree-for-babies-pequerecetas.name: Papaya Puree For Babies

ingredients.item: 150 g de papaya madura (aprox. 1 taza en cubitos bien llenos)

instructions: We fight 150 g of mature papaya, remove all the central seeds and cut them into small pits to facilitate shredding

We place 150 g of papaya in the beaker's or processor's glass and shredder up to a completely smooth texture. If we see that it's too thick (something unusual if fruit's ripe), we can add 1 or 2 tablespoons of water, milk or formula to smooth it.
If the papaya isn't mature enough, we can cook it steamed for 5-7 minutes till it's soft before shredded.
We check the texture with a spoon: it should be homogenous with no clumps or hard cuts.
We serve at once or we put into an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.

pappardelle-al-tartufo-with-butter-cream.name: Pappardelle Al Tartufo With Butter: Creamy Italian Recipe
pappardelle-al-tartufo-with-butter-cream.original_name: Pappardelle al tartufo con mantequilla: receta italiana y cremosa

ingredients.item: 200 gr de pappardelle frescos ((preferiblemente hechos en casa o de buena calidad artesanal))
25 gr de mantequilla sin sal, de alta calidad
10 gr de trufa negra rallada o laminada (fresca o en conserva)
1 cdita de pasta de miso blanco  ((opcional pero altamente recomendada))
30 g old reggian parmigian, thin frilling
1 cdita de aceite de trufa negra ((opcional))

instructions: Pon a hervir una olla grande con agua abundante y sal gruesa, como si fuese agua de mar. Este paso es crucial para realzar el sabor de la pasta.
Meanwhile, at a large frying pan with a thick bottom, melt butter with low heat. Add the white miso paste and remove until completely dissolved into butter.
Add half of the broken truffle to the butter and miso mixture. Cooking for 1 minute for truffle to infuse fat without frying.
Cooking papardelle till they are at dente, about 3-4 minutes if they are fresh. Reserve ½ cup of cooking water.
Drain dappardelle and transfer them directly to frying pan with butter and truffle. Add a few tablespoons of cooking water and blend strongly to emulsify.
Incorporates Reggian Parmigian, lemon grates and mixes till the salsa becomes sedated.
Turn off the fire, add some drops of truffle oil (if you use), salt in scales and pepper to suit.
It serves at once, crowned each plate with more truffle and a little more parmesan if desired.

parrot-eggs-recipe-comedera.name: Parrot Eggs Recipe
instructions: Cut the onion into small cubes.
The tomato will also be minced with the same size of onion. Since she's mature she's about to release quite a few fluids, she's trying to preserve them for cooking.
Warm up a large frying pan with medium heat, add a generous jet of vegetable oil and put the onion first.
Fold her a few minutes and scattering constantly.
He adds his tomato and keeps frying a few more minutes.
Now put a pint of salt into this frying, stir a little more and put out all four eggs.
Mezcla bien, constantemente para que se vayan cocinando uniformemente como si fuera huevos revueltos tradicionales.
Can cook more or less time depending on how consistent you wish them to have.
Once ready, put back the salt, put more if you think necessary, add pepper to your taste and serve immediately.

party-ready-italian-heros.name: Party-ready Italian Heros

ingredients.item: Italian hot spread sauce (such as tutto calabria) or 2 jarred pickled jalapeños

ingredients.prep: hero, or hoagie rolls, split lengthwise
such as prosciutto cotto, mortadella, coppa, hot soppressata, and/or Genoa salami

ingredients.item: Red wine vinegar and olive oil

instructions: Combine hot spread sauce and 1 tsp. oregano in a small bowl.
Place onion in a small bowl and add cold water to cover; let soak 10 minutes. Drain; pat dry.

Working one sandwich at a time, spread mayonnaise over each roll and ¼ cup Italian sauce mixture over bottom half. If using prosciutto and/or mortadella, drape slices so that the meat folds over itself to make a pleated mound down the length of the roll (about 4 slices total). Shingle other sliced meats of your choosing over top, overlapping slightly. Top with provolone, ½ cup iceberg, and some onion; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with vinegar and oil and sprinkle with a little more oregano. Close sandwich and cut in half crosswise.

pascal-goat-teleculinaria.name: Pascal Goat
instructions: Peel the vegetables and wash them. Cut the carrots in half and the onions and leeks in slices. Pinch the garlic finely, mix with all the vegetables and wrap some thyme and rosemary in twigs.

Retire o bedum ao cabrito, limpe-o de gorduras em excesso, coloque num prato ou tabuleiro de forno, e junte-lhe os legumes. Regue com azeite e o vinho e tempere com sal e pimenta. Deixe marinar durante 45 minutos.
Then cover with aluminum foil and oven, heated at 180

pasta-with-artichokes-step-by-step-comed.name: Pasta With Artichokes, Step By Step
pasta-with-artichokes-step-by-step-comed.original_name: Pasta con alcachofas, paso a paso

ingredients.item: 350 gr de pasta  ((puede ser penne, rigatoni, mezze maniche, fusilli))
70 gr de queso parmesano o pecorino
4  hojas de albahaca, menta o hierbabuena

instructions: We're gonna start our recipe, get our artichokes and get them the tougher or yellowish leaves. They'll always be first and second layers. Just cut his tit and his tips-- Then you'll get half pitted.
Take a big bowl, add water and lemon juice. Dig the artichokes into this liquid while we prepare the rest of the ingredients so that they don't fade and maintain their natural green color.
Coloca una olla con agua a fuego alto.
When water's at its boiling point, add the artichokes and cook for 7 minutes.
After that guy, you'll pay for his fire and place his artichokes to run till they're completely dry and at room temperature. Reserve.
Vamos a preparar la pasta, sigue las instrucciones de la marca o fabricante. Procura que siempre quede al dente.
While the dough is cooked, you will cut into tana or half-baked onion, and you will steal the garlic and cross the basil leaves. good weed or mint.
It will place a large frying pan onto the fire and add olive oil. We'll come and drink our garlic, and once you see it half a doradito add onion and mix.
When we look at our clear vegetables, we will cut our artichokes back into small cubes so that you can be easier to splinter and eat. Add them to the frying pan.
Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto, mezcla y deja saltear por 3 minutos aproximadamente.
Later, you will put the dough into the frying pan and the herbs we have been frying. We blend very well until everything goes and takes the flavour of spices, onion, garlic and artichokes.
When you see that everything's mixed up, put out the fire and you'll serve an honest plate. You'll spread his parmesan and Voilah cheese and have a super delicious food.
Enjoy!

pasta-with-broccoli-rabe-cima-di-rapa.name: Pasta With Broccoli Rabe (cima Di Rapa)
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook tortiglioni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until tender yet firm to the bite, 10 to 12 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large saute pan over medium-high heat. Add anchovies and garlic. Saute until slightly brown, 3 to 4 minutes, but do not overcook garlic, as this will make the dish bitter. Add broccoli rabe and stir to coat. Alternately add 1/2 of the bread crumbs and 1/2 of the Pecorino Siciliano cheese, stirring constantly, adding 1/2 tablespoon oil while mixing.

Drain pasta and fold into the mixture, taking care not to break the pasta. Fold in remaining cheese and bread crumbs gently. Top with remaining oil. Transfer to serving plates and sprinkle with red pepper.

pastrami-turkey-breast-for-thanksgiving-.name: Pastrami Turkey Breast For Thanksgiving Leftovers Sandwiches

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: cranberry sauce, lettuce, and pickled red onion (for serving)

instructions: Pat turkey dry (if there is skin you can leave it on. If not, you won’t miss it) and place in a medium bowl. Mix together pepper, salt, brown sugar, garlic powder, and paprika in a small bowl, then sprinkle all over turkey (use all of it!). Cover and chill 8–12 hours.

Preheat oven to 300°. Remove turkey from bowl and discard any liquid but keep all of the spice rub in place. Heat oil in a large ovenproof nonstick or cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Cook turkey, turning every minute or so, until browned on all sides and very fragrant, 6–8 minutes total.

Transfer skillet to oven. Roast turkey, turning halfway through, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 155°, 60–90 minutes, depending on size. Transfer turkey to a wire rack. If you plan to serve it the same day it’s baked, let cool at least 30 minutes, then slice very thinly (think deli meat) on a cutting board.

To serve, spread cut sides of buns with mayonnaise and build sandwiches with buns, turkey, cranberry sauce, lettuce, and pickled red onion.
Do ahead: Turkey can be roasted 4 days ahead. Let cool completely, then wrap tightly and chill. Slice just before using. Don’t try to reheat it as it will just dry out.

pavlova.name: Pavlova
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper; draw a 9-inch circle on the parchment paper.

Beat egg whites in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl until stiff but not dry. Gradually add sugar, about 1 tablespoon at a time, beating well after each addition. Continue beating until meringue is thick, white, and glossy.
Gently fold in cornstarch, vanilla extract, and lemon juice.

Spoon mixture inside the circle drawn on the parchment paper. Working from the center, spread mixture toward the outside edge and build the edge slightly. This should leave a slight depression in the center.
Bake in the preheated oven until meringue is dry and sounds hollow when tapped, about 1 hour. Cool on a wire rack.
Beat heavy cream in a medium bowl until stiff peaks form; set aside. Remove meringue from the parchment paper and place on a flat serving plate.
Fill center of meringue with whipped cream and top with kiwi slices.
Top with fruit and enjoy!

pea-puree-with-shrimp-and-scallops.name: Pea Puree With Shrimp And Scallops

ingredients.item: Shelled fresh peas (from about 2 1/4 pounds peas in pods) or frozen peas

instructions: Cook peas in large pot of boiling salted water until very tender, about 4 minutes for fresh and 2 minutes for frozen. Drain, reserving 1/2 cup cooking liquid. Set 2 tablespoons peas aside for garnish. Place remaining peas in processor. Add cheese, mint leaves, butter, and garlic. Puree pea mixture, adding pea cooking liquid by tablespoonfuls if too stiff, to form light and creamy puree. Season to taste with sea salt and freshly ground black pepper. Transfer to microwave-safe bowl. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 hour ahead. Cover and let stand at room temperature.

Heat olive oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Sprinkle shrimp and scallops with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Cook shrimp and scallops until golden brown outside and just opaque in center, about 2 minutes per side.

Microwave pea puree in 15-second intervals until warm. Spoon puree into center of plates. Place 2 shrimp and 2 scallops onto each plate, arranging atop puree. Sprinkle with reserved peas from pea puree, lemon peel, mint leaves, sea salt, and pepper. Drizzle each serving with extra- virgin olive oil and serve.

peanut-butter-chocolate-chip-banana-brea.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a 9x5-inch loaf pan with cooking spray.
Whisk whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl. Set aside.
Combine mashed bananas, brown sugar, peanut butter, yogurt, egg, and canola oil in a separate bowl; stir into flour mixture until thoroughly combined. Fold in chocolate chips.
Spoon batter into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned at edges, and a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, 40 to 50 minutes.
Cool bread in the pan on a wire rack for 15 minutes before removing from the pan to finish cooling on the rack.

peanut-rice-noodles-with-pork-and-collar.name: Peanut Rice Noodles With Pork And Collard Greens

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves thinly sliced

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of salted water to a boil. Remove from heat; add noodles. Let sit, stirring occasionally, until al dente, about 4 minutes (time may vary by brand). Drain and rinse under cold running water.
Meanwhile, whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, red pepper flakes, and 1 cup water in a medium bowl. (Sauce will look a little broken and lumpy.)

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Cook pork, breaking up with 2 forks, until nearly cooked through, about 5 minutes. Add ginger and garlic; cook, stirring, until softened, about 3 minutes. Add collard greens and cook, stirring occasionally, just until wilted, about 2 minutes. Add sauce and noodles and bring to a simmer; cook, tossing occasionally, until sauce is reduced by half and coats noodles, about 3 minutes. Season with salt.

pear-almond-and-dried-cherry-brown-betty.name: Pear, Almond, And Dried-cherry Brown Betty

ingredients.item: Poire williams (clear pear brandy) or regular brandy
X4-inch slices white sandwich bread with crust (such as buttermilk bread)
Freshly grated nutmeg or ground nutmeg
Firm but ripe pears (such as bosc or bartlett)
ingredients.prep: peeled, halved, cored, cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Combine cherries and brandy in small bowl; let soak until cherries soften, 1 to 2 hours. Drain (reserve brandy for another use).

Preheat oven to 191°C. Combine bread pieces and almonds in processor. Using on/off turns, blend until mixture resembles very coarse crumbs. Spread crumb mixture evenly on rimmed baking sheet. Bake until crumb mixture is light golden and crisp, about 16 minutes. Transfer crumb mixture to medium bowl; toss with melted butter. Set aside. Maintain oven temperature.

Mix 1 1/2 cups hot water and honey in 2-cup measuring cup. Combine drained cherries, brown sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, cinnamon, nutmeg, sea salt, and cloves in large bowl; stir to blend well. Add pear cubes and toss to coat.

Butter 9x9x2-inch metal baking pan. Sprinkle 1/3 of crumb mixture over bottom of prepared baking pan. Spread half of pear mixture over crumb mixture. Top with 1/3 of crumb mixture, then remaining pear mixture. Sprinkle remaining crumb mixture evenly over. Pour water-honey mixture over.

Cover pan tightly with foil and bake 30 minutes. Remove foil and bake uncovered until crumb mixture is golden brown on top and pear filling is bubbling thickly at edges, about 45 minutes longer. Remove from oven and cool at least 20 minutes. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cool completely, then cover and chill. Rewarm uncovered in 149°C oven 15 to 20 minutes.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream.

pecan-and-chocolate-tart-with-bourbon-wh.name: Pecan And Chocolate Tart With Bourbon Whipped Crème Fraîche

ingredients.item: Chopped pecans plus 1 1/2–2 cups pecan halves

instructions: Roll out Pâte Sucrée disk on a lightly floured work surface to a 1/8-inch-thick round, dusting with flour as necessary to prevent sticking. Transfer crust to tart pan; press onto bottom and up sides of pan. Trim dough flush with edge of pan. Chill for 1 hour.
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 350°. Spread out chopped pecans in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet and toast, stirring once or twice, until lightly browned and aromatic, 8-10 minutes.

Place butter in a small skillet over medium heat. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; add bean. Cook, swirling pan a few times, until butter browns and smells nutty, about 5 minutes. Discard vanilla bean.

Whisk sugar, both corn syrups, and salt in a large bowl. Whisk in warm brown butter, then eggs; whisk to blend. Spread chopped pecans in an even layer over prepared tart shell. Scatter chocolate over. Place pecan halves in concentric circles over chopped pecans and chocolate. Pour filling slowly and evenly over nuts.
Bake tart until filling is just set in center, 45-50 minutes.
Transfer tart to a wire rack; let cool for at least 30 minutes. DO AHEAD: Tart can be made 8 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Beat cream, crème fraîche, and bourbon until soft peaks form. DO AHEAD Bourbon whipped crème fraîche can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover; chill. Rewhisk before serving.
Remove pan sides. Cut tart into wedges. Serve warm or at room temperature with bourbon whipped crème fraîche.

pepper-sauce-recipe-for-meats-comedera.name: Pepper Sauce Recipe For Meats
pepper-sauce-recipe-for-meats-comedera.original_name: Receta de salsa a la pimienta para carnes
instructions: We have to start with heating up a frying pan and using them to melt the butter. It's important that it's not too hot to burn this ingredient.
With the butter melted and well spread throughout the surface of the frying pan, add the peppermint and let them cook a few minutes. They have to be removed from time to time.
Gather the alcohol into the frying pan and give them a minute of cooking to reduce them a little.
Then add the re broth and soon the milk cream. To mix everything well to achieve a uniform consistency.
Also add a touch of salt and mix well to integrate. This cooking after adding the cream will take about 5 minutes, during which to constantly remove and the salsa will thickle a little.
Now it's time to make two decisions as the cook likes. One is the consistency of the salsa. If this isn't enough, you can let them cook a few more minutes to get more creamy.

The other one's the date, so we have to get some salsa and get it right if we have to with some more salt. The powder pepper forms part of the ingredients of this list because there are also those who consider that without an additional touch of this condition, the salsa's taste remains very soft. If you're one of them, this is the time to add that touch.
Si ajustas el sabor de la salsa, revuelve muy bien y vuelve a probar.

pepperoni-pizza.name: Pepperoni Pizza

ingredients.item: Envelopes fleischmann's® pizza crust yeast or rapidrise® yeast

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Grease two 12-inch pizza pans.
Make sauce: Whisk together water, tomato paste, oregano, basil, garlic powder, onion powder, sugar, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl until smooth. Set aside.

Make crust: Combine 2 cups flour, yeast, sugar, and salt in a large bowl. Add warm water and oil; mix until well blended, about 1 minute. Gradually add remaining flour, a little at a time, until a soft, sticky dough forms.
Transfer dough to a floured surface; knead until dough is smooth and elastic, about 4 minutes. Add more flour as needed. (If using RapidRise yeast, let dough rest, covered, for 10 minutes.)
Divide dough in half. Lightly flour your hands, then pat each piece of dough onto the prepared pizza pans.
Top dough with sauce, cheese, and pepperoni.
Bake in the preheated oven until crusts are browned and cheese is bubbly, 18 to 20 minutes. Rotate pizza pans between the top and bottom oven racks halfway through baking.

petticoat-tails.name: Petticoat Tails
instructions: Beat butter, confectioners' sugar, and vanilla together in a bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Stir in flour and salt; press and mold dough into a long smooth roll about 2 inches in diameter. Wrap in plastic wrap; chill 3 to 5 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C).
Slice dough into 1/8- to 1/16-inch-thick slices; place on ungreased baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 8 to 10 minutes.

pickled-hot-peppers-with-tomatoes-lezzet.name: Pickled Hot Peppers With Tomatoes

ingredients.item: 500 g culture healing (or small neck natural flora)
Culture Can Use Castster Mushroom, Chima Growing Or Natural Forest Mushroom Instead of Mushroom.
If you have thicker cooked, you can add two or three to the marinade.
Instead of Apple cider vinegar, delicate sour or white vinegar can be preferred.
A lighter taste can reduce the nit rate of internal and mix with water.
You can use cake, pepper or pepper instead of melody.
Depending on the request, you can prepare a spicy pickled by adding 1-2 bitter red peppers.

pina-colada-macaroons.name: Pina Colada Macaroons
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line two baking sheets with parchment paper or silicone mats.

Combine coconut, pineapple, flour, macadamia nuts, and salt in a large bowl; stir in sweetened condensed milk, rum extract, and vanilla extract. Drop golf ball-sized scoops of dough 2 inches apart onto the prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until coconut is toasted, 12 to 15 minutes.

pine-nut-cookies-lezzet.name: Pine Nut Cookies

ingredients.item: Half cup grated hard white cheese

instructions: 1. Crush pine nuts in the kitchen robot.
2. Take the butter into the dough kneading container and cook with microserle.
3. Add salt and egg yolk and continue to rub.
4. Reindeed white cheese, pine nuts, thyme and flour.
5. Open the dough with half-century thickness on a slightly unified floor.
6. Cut the dough in the form of rounds with the help of the water cup.
7. Remove whipped egg whites onto the lubricated oven tray.
8. Spread a few pine nuts and gently press it.
9. Pre-heated 180 degree bake 10-12 minutes.
10. Serve your service.

pineapple-salsa.name: Pineapple Salsa
instructions: Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
Serve with chips or as a topping on your favorite meal.
Enjoy!

pineapple-sweet-and-sour-sauce.name: Pineapple Sweet And Sour Sauce
instructions: Whisk 1/4 cup pineapple juice and cornstarch together in a small bowl until smooth.

Combine remaining 1 3/4 cup pineapple juice, sugar, ketchup, vinegar, soy sauce, crushed pineapple, and garlic powder in a large pot over high heat. Stir in cornstarch mixture and cook, stirring frequently, until sauce comes to a gentle boil. Reduce the heat and simmer until sauce is clear and reaches desired consistency, 15 to 25 minutes.

pineapple-ginger-agua-fresca.name: Pineapple-ginger Agua Fresca
instructions: Puree pineapple, 1 cup water, and sugar in blender in batches until smooth. Pour into 8-cup measuring cup. Mix in 3 cups water and 2 teaspoons ginger. Cover; chill until cold, about 4 hours. Strain pineapple mixture into pitcher, pressing on solids in strainer. Add more ginger to taste. Fill tall glasses with ice. Pour agua fresca over.

pizza-carpaccio-lezzet.name: Pizza Carpaccio
instructions: 1. Take the pizza dough on the unspoiled counter after resting enough in the refrigerator.
2. Open a dough with 30-32 cm.
3. Open the pizza dough by pressing the chopped round oven tray or pizza tray with your fingers.
4. Do it with the help of tomato sauce brush that you have prepared in advance.
5. Spread cheese.
6. Cook the dough until the dough is fryed for 15-20 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 180 degrees.
7. Pizza dough from the oven and fine sliced dana carpacciolar index.
8. Place fine sliced mozzarella cheeses on carpacciolar, decorate it with roka leaves.
9. Serve slice and hot.
10. Take note of the recipe of pizza dough you will need in the recipe.

pizzoccheri-alla-valtellinese-typical-lo.name: Pizzoccheri Alla Valtellinese (typical Lombardy Buckwheat Pasta)
pizzoccheri-alla-valtellinese-typical-lo.original_name: Pizzoccheri alla valtellinese (pasta de trigo sarraceno típica de Lombardía)

ingredients.item: 400 g of Saracene wheat flour (you can buy here)
40 g padan gran cheese (you can buy here)

instructions: In a large bowl we mix the two Fairy Fairy we heat up water till it reaches about 50 ″ 3 ″, the most comfortable thing to wear a kitchen thermometer as this. The hot water will help the starch of Saracene wheat to amalgamate more easily. We put the water onto the flour and we start to bawk into the bowl, and then we move onto the top and we continue to bawl strongly. To get the dough as elastic as possible, we have to get quite an amasado about 15 minutes. If you have a much easier dresser, with about 10 minutes, that's enough.

We form a ball, we smash it a little with our hands and then we start to extend it with the roller, we have to stay about 2-3 mm thick. If you have a machine to make dough as this uses to make your homework easier. With a knife we cut the edges to get a more or less regular rectangle, sprinkle with Saracene wheat flour and cut strips 7 cm wide. We get about 3 strips, if we have to sprinkle with a little more flour so they don't stick, and we get to cut pizzoccheri from about 5 mm to 1 cm wide as you best like. We'll have a 7 cm long dough with a width of 5-10 mm.
Lavamos las acelgas y las cortamos en tiras. Pelamos las patatas y las cortamos en cubos. Cortamos el queso en tiras finas. Cortamos los dientes de ajo, sin pelarlos, a la mitad.

We get a big pot with water to cook. That's got to be big. When water boils, we have 10 g of thick salt for every liter of water. Let's put our potatoes and cook them alone for two minutes. After 2 minutes, we added the acceleras. Once another 3-4 minutes have passed, we put half of the pizzoccheri slowly and remove with the handle of a wooden spoon so they don't stick. Similarly we add the other half and let cook 4 minutes.

While pizzoccheri are cooked, we put butter and garlic in a frying pan and let it dissolve with soft heat, till it gets a soft golden color. We prepare the fountain where we will put pizzoccheri, we will put it on the pot in balance so that it gets hot a little (you can also warm it with hot water). With a pizzoccheri we scold with potatoes and accelerates and put them to the fountain, creating a first cape. Do well to avoid passing water to the source. We put up a cape of cheese strips, and then another of pizzoccheri and so alternates to finish. We polish with padan raw cheese, we cover with aluminum or a kitchen cloth and put the fountain onto the pot with water still hot (but with fire off). The butter will be golden and have to have an hazelnut color. Then we clear up the fountain, we'll see that the cheese will be fused and we'll put the butter up with the garlic. We blend delicately and serve immediately.

plum-thyme-cut-out-pie.name: Plum-thyme Cut-out Pie

ingredients.item: Lemon thyme leaves or thyme leaves

instructions: Roll out a disk of dough on a lightly floured surface to a 13" round (about ¼" thick). Transfer round to a parchment-lined baking sheet and chill while you roll out remaining piece of dough. Decoratively cut out shapes in the center of the second round, staying several inches in from the edges (long triangles, circles, diamonds—whatever tickles your fancy). Stack on top of the first round of dough. Chill while you prepare filling.
Preheat oven to 350°. Combine granulated sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a large bowl. Add plums, vinegar, and thyme and toss to coat fruit evenly in sugar mixture.

Beat egg with 1 tsp. water in a small bowl just to blend. Lift parchment with cut-out round of dough onto work surface. Using your hands, or wrapping dough around a floured rolling pin if you're nervous, carefully transfer uncut round of dough to a 9" pie dish. Lift up edges and allow dough to slump down into dish. Trim edges of dough with kitchen shears to even out, leaving at least a 1 ½" overhang; brush edge with half of egg wash. Scrape in plum filling along with any accumulated juices in bowl, then, using parchment, carefully transfer cut-out round of dough to pie, placing over filling.
Working your way around the circumference, press edges of dough together to seal. Crimp as desired. Brush dough with remaining egg wash; sprinkle with demerara sugar.

Place pie pan on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet (juices may bubble over—this is what the foil is for). Bake until crust is deep golden brown on top and bottom and juices are bubbling, about 1½ hours. Transfer pie to a wire rack and let sit at least 4 hours before slicing.
Do Ahead: Pie can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

poached-eggs-in-chicken-broth.name: Poached Eggs In Chicken Broth

ingredients.item: Homemade chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth

ingredients.prep: green and white parts separated, coarsely chopped

instructions: Bring stock to a simmer in a small pot over medium-high heat. Crack an egg into a small bowl, then gently slide egg into stock. (If you want a crystal-clear broth, you can poach the eggs in water instead.) Repeat with remaining eggs, waiting until whites are opaque before adding the next one (about 30 seconds). Poach eggs until whites are set and yolks are still runny, about 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer eggs to paper towels as they are done.

Reduce heat to medium and return stock to a gentle simmer. Add asparagus, carrots, mushrooms, and white parts of ramps. Cook, stirring occasionally, until asparagus and carrots are tender, 3–5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in basil, vinegar, and ramp greens; season with salt.
Divide broth and vegetables among bowls. Gently slip an egg into each bowl; season with pepper and drizzle with oil.

poker-night-marinade-for-steak.name: Poker Night Marinade For Steak
instructions: Combine olive oil, soy sauce, oregano, cumin, red wine, Worcestershire sauce, liquid smoke, lime juice, Sriracha, black pepper, garlic, cayenne pepper, and chili powder in a blender. Puree for 2 minutes.

pork-and-shiitake-congee.name: Pork And Shiitake Congee

ingredients.item: Jasmine rice or short- or medium-grain white rice
White or freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Place 1 cup jasmine rice in a fine-mesh strainer and rinse in several changes of water until water runs clear. Drain. Transfer rice to a freezer-safe container and freeze overnight. If you use a plastic bag, don't toss it when you're done: Just rinse it out, let it dry, and save it for the future. (This step helps the rice break down faster when you’re cooking it, which dramatically reduces its cooking time. If you don’t have time to freeze your rice, that’s okay; you’ll just cook it longer in step 8.)

Prepare your ingredients: Mix 4 oz. ground pork, 1 Tbsp. finely grated peeled ginger, and 1 Tbsp. soy sauce in a medium bowl and let sit 10 minutes. Trim woody ends of 4 oz. shiitake mushrooms, then cut into thin slices. Trim root ends off 4 scallions and thinly slice crosswise.
Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium-high. Add sliced mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden and crisp, 6–8 minutes.

Reduce heat to medium-low, add half of sliced scallions (reserve remaining scallions for serving), and cook, stirring, until scallions are aromatic and fragrant but not browned, 1-2 minutes. Transfer mushrooms and scallions to a plate.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in same saucepan over medium. Add marinated pork and cook, stirring once, just until it turns from pink and translucent to lightly browned and opaque, about 1 minute. Transfer pork to plate with mushrooms and scallions. It won’t be fully cooked through but that's okay—you'll return it to the congee later on.

Add 7 cups water to saucepan and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Add frozen rice (or unfrozen rice, if using) and return to a boil, stirring to prevent sticking. Scrape up any brown bits that have stuck to the bottom of the pan—there's great porky flavor there! Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until thick, porridge-like, and rice has broken apart, about 20 minutes for frozen rice, and 1½ hours for unfrozen rice. If you are using a short- or medium-grain white rice (as opposed to jasmine), this time might vary.

Stir in pork, mushrooms, and scallions and let simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors have melded, another 5 minutes. Check the texture: If you want a thinner congee, add more water. If you want a thicker, more oatmeal-like texture, continue to cook, stirring frequently, until it reaches the desired consistency. Season soup with kosher salt and white or black pepper.
Divide congee among bowls. Top with reserved scallions and chili oil, if using.

pork-ragu-over-creamy-polenta.name: Pork Ragù Over Creamy Polenta

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Season pork with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium. Cook pork, turning often, until evenly browned, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to a platter and pour off pan drippings.

Wipe out any burned bits from pot, but leave the golden-brown pieces (doing this will keep the finished sauce from tasting bitter). Add onion and garlic to pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is starting to brown and caramelize, 12–15 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly darkened in color, 5–8 minutes.
Add wine and cook, scraping up any browned bits, until reduced by about half, 5–8 minutes.
Add tomatoes, crushing with your hands as you go, then add thyme, rosemary, and bay leaves; stir in 2 cups water. Add pork with any juices accumulated on the platter; season with salt and pepper.

Bring liquid to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, partially covered, until pork is falling-apart tender, sauce is thickened (it will be thicker than a typical pasta sauce), and flavors have melded, 2½–3 hours.
Using 2 forks, break up pork into pieces or shred it (your choice!); taste and season with salt and pepper.
Pork can be cooked 5 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill in sauce.

Bring 6 cups salted water to a boil in a large pot. Whisking constantly, gradually add polenta; reduce heat to medium-low. Cook, whisking often, until polenta is tender and creamy, 20–25 minutes (if polenta becomes too thick too soon, loosen mixture by adding more water and continue cooking). Add butter and ½ cup Parmesan to polenta and whisk until melted; season with salt and pepper.
Spoon polenta into bowls or onto a platter and top with pork. Scatter parsley and more Parmesan over top and drizzle with oil.

pork-secretions-with-grapes-teleculinari.name: Pork Secretions With Grapes
instructions: Peel the orange, remove the gomes and film that surrounds them and reserve. Season the meat with crushed garlic, lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Leve ao lume uma frigideira com o azeite, junte os secretos e aloure-os muito bem. Retire e reserve.
Prepare o acompanhamento: lave a couve e corte-a em juliana. Leve ao lume uma frigideira com um pouco de azeite e os alhos picados e salteie a couve.

Na mesma frigideira, coloque as uvas, previamente lavadas, e os gomos de laranja. Deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, depois adicione os secretos, misture bem e sirva-os com o arroz, polvilhados com salsa picada.

pork-shank-garbure.name: Pork Shank Garbure

ingredients.prep:
white and pale green parts only, halved
lengthwise, thinly sliced

peeled, quartered lengthwise, cut into
2"–3" pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 3 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. pork neck bones and/or pig’s tails and/or ears

ingredients.prep:
navy, or cannellini),
soaked overnight, drained

ingredients.item: Toasted country-style bread and room-temperature butter

instructions: Melt 4 Tbsp. duck fat or unsalted butter in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high heat. Add 2 medium onions, quartered through root ends, 4 medium leeks, white and pale green parts only, halved lengthwise, thinly sliced, 6 medium carrots, peeled, quartered lengthwise, cut into 2"–3" pieces, 8 garlic cloves, halved, and 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt; season with freshly ground pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until carrots are slightly softened and onions are translucent, 5–7 minutes.

Pour in ¼ cup cognac or whiskey and cook, stirring, until evaporated, about 1 minute. Make a well in the center of onion mixture and add 2 lb. pork shanks with skin, soaked overnight in fridge, drained, and 2 lb. pork neck bones and/or pig’s tails and/or ears (if using). Arrange 1 small head of savoy cabbage, cored, cut into 8 wedges, in a mostly even layer in pot; sprinkle with 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Pour in 7 cups water and bring to a boil, skimming any foam from surface as needed. Reduce heat, cover pot, and cook, adjusting heat as needed to maintain a simmer, 1½ hours.

Stir in 1½ cups white beans, soaked overnight, drained, cover pot, and cook, stirring occasionally and skimming any foam from surface, 1 hour. Add 8 small Yukon Gold potatoes, peeled, pushing down into soup to submerge; add up to another 1 cup water if needed to cover. Return soup to a simmer and cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until beans and potatoes are tender, 60–75 minutes.

Using tongs, transfer pork shanks and neck bones to a
cutting board and let cool slightly. Pick meat from bones; discard skin, bones, and
large pieces of fat. Shred meat and return to pot. Taste soup and season with more salt
and pepper if needed.

Ladle soup into bowls. Serve with toasted country-style bread and room-temperature butter alongside.
Do Ahead: Soup can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat, covered, over medium-low heat.

pork-tenderloin-with-agrodolce-cherries.name: Pork Tenderloin With Agrodolce Cherries

ingredients.prep: peeled, halved lengthwise, or 2 small red onions, quartered

instructions: Place 2 pork tenderloins (about 2 lb. total) on a small rimmed baking sheet and season all over with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Combine ¼ cup honey, ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, and 1 cup red wine vinegar in a measuring glass or small bowl and stir to dissolve honey; set aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook tenderloins, turning occasionally, until golden brown all over, 6–8 minutes total. Using tongs, transfer to a large plate.

Add remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil to pan and arrange 12 oz. shallots (about 11 medium), peeled, halved lengthwise, or 2 small red onions, quartered, cut side down, in skillet; season with salt. Cook, undisturbed, until beginning to char underneath, about 3 minutes. Scoot shallots to edges of skillet and return tenderloins along with any juices that have collected on plate to pan. Add reserved vinegar mixture and bring to a simmer. Cook, turning pork every few minutes and reducing heat as necessary to maintain a gentle simmer, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of meat registers 140° and shallots are tender, 7–12 minutes. Transfer tenderloins to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes.

While pork is resting, add 2 cups pitted fresh (or frozen) sweet cherries (about 10 oz.) to pan and cook, stirring, until cherries are warmed through and sauce is beginning to look syrupy, about 4 minutes (you may need a couple minutes more if using frozen cherries). Remove from heat. Add 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, and remaining 2 Tbsp. red wine vinegar and swirl to combine; season with salt.
Slice pork and arrange on a platter or plates. Spoon agrodolce cherries and shallots over.

pork-with-oatmeal-from-kos-argiro.name: Pork With Oatmeal From Kos
pork-with-oatmeal-from-kos-argiro.original_name: Χοιρινό με πλιγούρι από την Κω
instructions: For the traditional recipe from Kos, choose pork meat preferably from the neck.
We will prepare the pork in the pot and make easy little preparation for the oatmeal.
Finely chop the pork in small bites and dry it on absorbent paper.
Heat the olive oil in a pot.
Add the finely chopped pork to the hot oil and turn round for 6-7 minutes to make a crust.
Pour hot water to cover the pork completely in the pot (about 2-1/2 cup hot water).
Add salt, pepper and plenty of cumin.
Cover the pot and bottle the pork for about 40’ until it complete softens and stays with a little zoom in the pot.
When the pork turns soft and stays with some sauce in the pot, add the soaked oatmeal.
Turn off the fire immediately.
Mix the pork oatmeal with a spoon. You can add extra cumin if you want.
We control salt and pepper.
Cover the pot and let the traditional food stay for 5-6’ covered to absorb all the oatmeal from the pork.
Serve the hot pork oatmeal immediately before drying completely.
I always enjoy it with a spoonful of yogurt. As pork oatmeal is warm, yogurt melts and becomes creamy texture. Try it.

portuguese-shrimp.name: Portuguese Shrimp
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until softened, about 5 minutes. Stir in parsley, tomato paste, hot pepper sauce, chicken bouillon, and paprika. Pour in 1/2 the ale; simmer until flavors combine, about 5 minutes.
Pour remaining 1/2 ale into skillet; add shrimp. Season with salt. Cook until shrimp absorbs liquid and turns pink, 15 to 20 minutes.

potato-and-ham-chowder.name: Potato And Ham Chowder
instructions: Cook and stir bacon and ham together in a large pot over medium-high heat until some of the bacon fat renders, 7 to 10 minutes. Add the onion and continue cooking until the bacon and ham are browned and the onion translucent, 5 to 7 minutes more.

Pour milk and potato soup into the pot; add potatoes, garlic salt, and pepper. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook mixture at a simmer, stirring frequently, until heated through and slightly thickened, about 20 minutes.
Ladle soup into bowls and top with Cheddar cheese and green onions.

potato-chip-pizza.name: Potato Chip Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven to 260°C (260 degrees C). Rub 2 sheet pans with a few teaspoons of olive oil, and sprinkle over a light dusting of cornmeal. Set aside.

Roll each dough ball into an oval shape about 1/8-inch thick and transfer onto the prepared pans. Cover each with pesto sauce, reserving about 2 tablespoons for the topping. Sprinkle each with Cheddar cheese. Add potato chips in one thick layer, overlapping chips as need to cover the surface.

For each pizza, thin out reserved pesto with a tablespoon of olive oil, and then drip and drizzle it over the top of the chips. Top with red onions and mozzarella. Drizzle the tops of the pizzas with a little bit of olive oil.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until top and bottom crust of pizza is browned, 12 to 15 minutes. Let rest for 5 minutes before cutting.

potato-nuggets.name: Potato Nuggets
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Place potatoes in a large pot and pour in water to cover by 2". Season water generously with salt and bring to a simmer over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and simmer gently until potatoes are tender on the outside but still very firm in the center, 8–10 minutes.

Pour off all of the water in pot, holding potatoes back (make sure there's no liquid left!). Let potatoes sit, uncovered, for a few minutes to steam off any excess liquid they've absorbed. Toss potatoes just enough to rough up their outsides and give them a floury starchy coating (do not toss so vigorously that they fall apart); season with salt.
Meanwhile, combine both oils in a large roasting pan and heat in oven 10 minutes.

Carefully remove pan from oven; add potatoes, turning each one to coat and moisten exterior. Make sure they're in a single layer and leave a bit of space between them. Return pan to oven and roast potatoes, turning every 10 minutes, for 30 minutes (if they aren't browning after 15 minutes, increase oven temperature to 450°).

Toss in garlic and rosemary and cook until potatoes are deep golden brown on most of their sides, 8–10 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer potatoes to a platter and serve with roasted garlic and rosemary alongside.

potato-omelette-recipe-with-spinach-come.name: Potato Omelette Recipe With Spinach
potato-omelette-recipe-with-spinach-come.original_name: Receta de tortilla de papas con espinacas
instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into small cubes.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and sauté the potatoes with medium heat till they are tender but not golden or fried. You have to pay attention to cooking.
Once the potatoes are tender, withdraw and reserve.
In the same frying pan, purge the onion cut into julians till they are transparent.
Incorpora las espinacas y saltea junto a la cebolla por 2 minutos. Apaga y reserva.
Agrega uno por uno los huevos a un bol, sazona con sal y pimienta a tu gusto y bate hasta que queden espumosos.
Incorpora las papas, cebolla y espinacas cocidas e integra con movimientos envolventes para que las verduras no se deshagan.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil and pour the mixture.
Cocina por 7 minutos o hasta que vayan saliendo burbujas en la superficie y, con la ayuda de un plato, voltea.
Finish cooking for 5 minutes or till it's well curved and ready.
Retire from the frying pan, let them stand about 5 minutes and enjoy this rich omelette.

potato-soup-with-fresh-greens-lezzet.name: Potato Soup With Fresh Greens
instructions: 1. In the form of a cube, roast the chopped olive oil until pink.
2. Add potatoes and sauce for a few minutes.
3. Add water until you go over and sprinkle until you completely soften.
4. Take potatoes from the blender.
5. Add hot water if necessary and boil a few stones.
6. Reindeed garlic, salt, pepper, mustal, vinegar, mayonnaise and add fresh greens from the kitchen robot to the soup.
7. Take olive oil on the bowls.
8. Decorate and serve with walnuts.

potatoes-with-eggs-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Potatoes With Eggs In The Oven
instructions: Wash the potatoes, clean them and cut them into four. Add them to a small baking pan in a layer.
Add salt, pepper, olive oil, tomato and 1 cup. water.
Cover the baking pan with non-stick paper and aluminum foil and baking the potatoes in a preheated oven, at 200°3, in the air for 30 minutes.
Then expose them, mix them with a spoon and continue baking for 15 minutes, to dry completely and stay with their oil.
Beat the eggs in a bowl and add the yoghurt to dissolve.
Sprinkle the potatoes with feta cheese and chives and pour them with the egg mixture.
Lower the temperature to 180
Let it cool a little before we cut it and serve it. We accompany it with a village salad.

potlikker-noodles-with-mustard-greens.name: Potlikker Noodles With Mustard Greens

ingredients.item: -ounce smoked ham hock or smoked turkey wing

ingredients.prep: tough stems trimmed, chopped, and reserved, leaves chopped

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add ham hock and cook, turning occasionally, until browned, about 8 minutes. Reduce heat to medium. Add onion, garlic, and bay leaves; cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is beginning to brown, about 5 minutes. Add vinegar and stir, scraping up any browned bits. Stir in hot sauce and sugar. Add broth and reserved mustard green stems and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until liquid is reduced to 2 cups, 1–2 hours. Set a sieve over a large bowl or measuring cup. Strain potlikker into bowl. Pick and reserve the meat from the ham hock to add to the noodles later, if desired. Discard skin, bone, and remaining solids in sieve. Set potlikker aside. DO AHEAD: Potlikker and Potlikker and ham can be made 2 days ahead. Chill separately until cold; cover and keep chilled.
Cook noodles in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain and set aside.

Meanwhile, heat a large pot over medium heat. Add bacon and cook, stirring occasionally, until crispy. Add shallots and reserved picked meat, if using; cook, stirring occasionally, until shallots are soft, 4–5 minutes. Pour off any excess fat in pan. Increase heat to medium-high; add greens and cook, stirring constantly, until wilted. Add potlikker, scraping up browned bits with a wooden spoon, and bring to a boil. Add noodles; toss to coat, and heat through. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Transfer noodle mixture to serving bowls and sprinkle with Pecorino.

practical-shish-meatballs-recipe-lezzet.name: Practical Shish Meatballs Recipe
instructions: 1. Take the mint to a large mixing container.
2. U add grated onion, garlic, galeta boiled and eggs.
3. Add salt, pepper, cumin and red powder pepper and knead thoroughly.
4. Finally add thin chopped parser.
5. K&ouml was listened to thefte mortar for about 10 minutes in the refrigerator for 15 minutes.
6. Meatballs from wood skews;irin.
7. Eat potatoes in thick slices.
8. Shake with olive oil, salt and pepper in the pan or oven.
9. Bake mole in the grill, pan or bake is about 15 minutes.
10. Place potatoes from the service plate before, u fortune the car in a warm way by putting the puff mole.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

practical-tray-pastry-with-spinach-lezze.name: Practical Tray Pastry With Spinach
instructions: 1. Lightweight kneading bread dough.
2. Cover over with a damp cloth and rest for an hour.
3. Wash the spinachs for the inner mortar and drain the water and eat fine.
4. Lightly heat the olive oil in a large pan and add the spinachs you eat and lightly.
5. Taste with salt and spices and get from the stove.
6. Add and mix Lor cheese.
7. Take the chopped bread dough on the countertop.
8. Give the roller shape with your hands and take 8 equal cloths.
9. Open each bezeyi in 15 cm diameter.
10.   Take a rounded oven tray, melted butter from the crazes you have.
11. 11. The deserted harper broadcasting you prepared on.
12.  Other four bezeyis also take melted butter on their intermediates and indexed together.
12. August   Check the full middle round with the help of a glass and cut around evenly with the help of a blade and wrap the eggs wrapped with the remaining fat.
14 July Cook until 25-30 minutes fry in the oven pre-heated 200 degree by sprinkled sesame and precipitation.

prepare-a-creamy-pappardelle-with-burrat.name: Prepare A Creamy Pappardelle With Burrata And Tomato Confit
prepare-a-creamy-pappardelle-with-burrat.original_name: Prepara una cremosa pappardelle con burrata y tomate confitado

ingredients.item: 4 cdas de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)

instructions: It purifies the oven to 140 been 3 been (140 been 3). Cut the cherry tomatoes in half and place them on a plate with scroll paper. Add oil, sugar, balsamic, herbs, salt and pepper. Hornea for 1 hour or until they are wrinkled and caramelized but still juicy.
It steals the dough into water with abundant salt as instructed by the package. If it's fresh dough, 3-4 minutes. Reserve half a cup of cooking water before cooking.
Jumps garlic (optional) into a frying pan with butter under low heat until golden. Add the steamed tomatoes already baked and warm them gently.
It incorporates dough into frying pan with tomatoes. Add a dedicated cooking water chorrit to purify the sauce. Mix well so that flavors are integrated.
It serves hot, placing a ppppardelle nest at the plate, an entire burrat at the centre, lime fringes above, basil leaves and an extra virgin olive oil chorrit.
Rompe la burrata justo antes de comer para que su cremosidad se mezcle con la pasta.

prepare-a-delicious-chicken-pie-comedera.name: Prepare A Delicious Chicken Pie
prepare-a-delicious-chicken-pie-comedera.original_name: Prepara un rico pastel de pollo
instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta preparando todos los ingredientes.
We'll go and have the chicken. We'll put him into a bowl and add salt and pepper to his taste, paprika and oregano. Mix very well till well seasoned.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil and add the chicken. Jumps for about 5 minutes.
Now, get some of the chicken stock into the frying pan. Mixing, shutting and saving.
Now, warm up another frying pan. And add the garlic, give it some.
It should be added to onion, carrot and chicas. Mix and cook for 1 minute.
It's time to add the tablespoons of wheat flour to the frying pan and the rest of the chicken stock. Mix to integrate everything. Cooking for 5 minutes with medium heat till thick.
It's time to put sour cream into frying pan and integrate with the other ingredients. At that time she adds the chicken as well.
Mezcla y deja cocinar por 3 minutos aproximadamente hasta que tengas un pollo bien cremoso y delicioso.
Apaga y reserva.

prepare-a-delicious-cold-pineapple-peel-.name: Prepare A Delicious Cold Pineapple Peel Tea With Lemon
prepare-a-delicious-cold-pineapple-peel-.original_name: Prepara un rico té frío de cáscara de piña con limón
instructions: Wash and disinfect the pineapple skin very well.
Put the well washed skin into a pot and pour the water.
Lleva al fuego y cocina hasta que hierva.
Baja el fuego a medio y cocina por 15 minutos.
After that time, withdraw from the fire and let rest for 20 minutes to get a focused tea.
Fold the infusion and add the sugar to dissolve. Let them cool completely.
Once at room temperature, pour the lemon juice and mix. Sugar rectification.
Serve tea and come with plenty of ice. Decorate with some pineapple and you'll be ready to taste.
Enjoy!

prepare-a-delicious-oatmeal-and-coconut-.name: Prepare A Delicious Oatmeal And Coconut Horchata
prepare-a-delicious-oatmeal-and-coconut-.original_name: Prepara una deliciosa horchata de avena y coco

ingredients.item: ¼ cup of sugar or sugar replacement

instructions: Inicia tu receta y agrega las hojuelas de avena y dos tazas de agua. Mezcla y deja remojar para hidratarla durante 3 horas.
Pasado ese tiempo, pon la avena hidratada en una licuadora
Luego echa el resto de las tazas de agua y la leche de coco.
It's time to put the sugar or its replacement, cinnamon powder and pint of nutmeg.
He's good at his license and he's trying his best till you have an even and clumsy drink.
With the help of a small tablespoon, make the melon balls.
Serve the baking in an icy glass and decorate with the melon pearls.
Enjoy!

prepare-hot-marshal-a-delicious-chilean-.name: Prepare Hot Marshal, A Delicious Chilean Dish
prepare-hot-marshal-a-delicious-chilean-.original_name: Prepara mariscal caliente, un rico plato chileno

ingredients.item: 300 gr de choritos (mejillones) cocidos y sin concha
200 gr de pescado blanco fresco  ((reineta, merluza o congrio) en cubos)
1/2 taza de caldo de mariscos caliente

instructions: In a big bowl, place fish cubes with shrimp, squids and clams. Add lemon juice and leave to stand in the refrigerator for 20 minutes so that the acids start to & quot; cook & quot; seafood.
In a large frying pan with medium heat, heats an olive oil chorrit and pits the onion, garlic and aji till they are tender and frail.

Add the scuba and seafood (with its lemon juice), gently stirring. Then pour the hot seafood stock and the white wine. Cooking at medium heat for 3-4 minutes, preventing shellfish from being overcooked.
Add salt and pepper to taste and remove from fire. Sprinkle the cilantro and minced parsley before serving.
Sirve el mariscal caliente inmediatamente y disfruta.

puff-pastry-bear-claws.name: Puff Pastry Bear Claws

ingredients.prep: thawed and rolled out into a 16x16-inch square

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Beat ⅓ cup superfine sugar and butter together in a bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Add eggs yolks; beat well. Beat in almond extract. Stir in ground almonds and flour until reaches a thick paste-like consistency.

Cut puff pastry into 8 equal pieces. Place 1 tablespoon almond mixture in lower center of each piece puff pastry. Fold puff pastry over filling; press edges together to seal. Make three ½-inch cuts, equally spaced apart on bottom edge, to make 'claws.' Transfer pastries to a baking sheet.
Whisk whole egg and water together in a bowl; brush on each bear claw, then sprinkle with remaining 2 tablespoons superfine sugar and sliced almonds.
Bake in the preheated oven until puffed and golden brown, 15 to 20 minutes.

pull-apart-flauta-ring.name: Pull-apart Flauta Ring
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, combine the chicken, onion, red bell pepper, jalapeño, ½ cup (50 g) of Monterey Jack cheese, ½ cup (50 g) of cheddar cheese, the lime juice, and taco seasoning. Mix thoroughly.

Place one of the tortillas on a cutting board. Scoop 2 tablespoons of the chicken mixture onto the bottom edge of the tortilla. Roll up the tortilla tightly, then cut in half crosswise. Repeat with the rest of the tortillas and filling.

Arrange the flautas in a circle on the baking sheet. Sprinkle with half of the remaining cheddar and Monterey Jack cheese. Place a second layer of flautas on top of the first so they are overlapping. Sprinkle with the rest of the cheese. Place the rest of the flautas on top to make a third layer.
Bake for 30 minutes, until golden brown and crisp.
Sprinkle with cilantro, then serve immediately with guacamole and salsa for dipping.
Enjoy!

pumpkin-dessert.name: Pumpkin Dessert
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Make crust: Transfer 1 cup cake mix to a small bowl; set aside for topping. Place remaining cake mix in a medium bowl with melted butter and egg; mix until well blended.
Spread mixture into the bottom of the prepared baking dish.
Make filling: Combine pumpkin puree, eggs, milk, brown sugar, and pumpkin pie spice in a large bowl; mix well and pour over crust.
Make topping: Add white sugar and cubed butter to reserved cake mix; use a pastry blender to mix until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Sprinkle over pumpkin filling, then scatter chopped walnuts over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top is golden brown, 45 to 50 minutes.

pumpkin-spice.name: Pumpkin Spice
instructions: Mix together cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and cloves in a small bowl.

pumpkin-streusel-bundt-cake.name: Pumpkin Streusel Bundt® Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a fluted tube pan (such as Bundt®) with nonstick spray.
Combine pumpkin, sugar, oil, eggs, and pumpkin pie spice extract in a large bowl. Stir until well combined.
Sift flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt into a bowl. Stir into pumpkin mixture. Pour into prepared pan.
Combine flour, brown sugar, melted butter, pumpkin pie spice, and salt for the streusel in a bowl. Stir in pecans. Sprinkle streusel over the cake.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in center comes out clean, 55 to 65 minutes. Cool on wire rack for 15 minutes.
Run a knife around the cake pan and flip onto a plate. Immediately flip the cake onto a serving platter so the streusel is on top.

punch-teleculinaria.name: Punch
instructions: Prepare the lemon punch: cut the 1 lemon peel, lie in a jar and add sugar to taste. Crush with a pestle.
Squeeze the orange juice and the other lemons and add to the previous mixture. Add the brandy and lemon slices, fill with water and mix well. Take it to the fridge to get very cold.
Prepare the passion fruit punch: cut the lemon peel, lay in a jar and add the sugar. Crush with a pestle.

Squeeze orange and lemon juice and add to the previous mixture. Add the brandy, passion fruit concentrate and passion fruit pulp and mix everything well. Take it to the fridge to get very cold. Serve the ponches very fresh or with ice rocks.

punjabi-samosa-lezzet.name: Punjabi Samosa

ingredients.item: Half tea cup lemon suy  u

instructions: 1. Roast potatoes in the form of cube and in plenty of water.
2. Eat peas.
3. Heat the liquid to 1 cup of tea in a pan.
4. Add cumin, cheek seeds and peas, and sauce for 5 minutes.
5. Dust red pepper, add dust mist salt and continue to hang.
6. Add and mix potatoes.
7. Lemon juice, with garam table and fresh cook, and leave to cool by mixing.
8. For dough, criticize the flour from a rough.
9. Add salt, oil and water and knead.
10. Take the dough into 10 equal round parts.
11. 11. Split each ball into two.
12. Get parts in cone shape by opening.
12. August Divided internal material into pieces.
14 July Combine the dough with soaking the ends.
15.   Reheat the remaining oil in a pan and fry the cones filled with inner material until brown.
16. Serve hot or warm.
